global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a clear focus on the promotional offer.
global.main_message: Promoting a free trial for FluxStream with an exclusive offer.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a lively and fresh feel.

elements.label: FluxStream logo
elements.description: The logo 'FluxStream' is prominently displayed at the top center in bold, modern typography.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small 'UGC' label appears at the top left, indicating user-generated content, in a simple font.

elements.label: Exclusive offer headline
elements.description: The headline 'Exclusive tonight' is bold and large, positioned centrally to grab attention.

elements.label: Call to action text
elements.description: The text 'Start free today' is smaller and placed directly below the headline, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: The price '€19.99' is displayed in a prominent position at the bottom, designed to attract attention.

elements.label: Try for free button
elements.description: A bold button labeled 'Try for free' is located at the bottom center, inviting users to take action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, FluxStream, exclusive offer, free trial
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the UGC label, the headline in the center, body text below it, and the price and CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Exclusive tonight, Start free today, €19.99, FluxStream, UGC
